nav.promo: Sicilian citrus straight from the grower
nav.promoSub: Fresh shipping across Italy, from our field to your table.

hero.title: FOUR GENERATIONS, ONE LAND
hero.subtitle: We grow organic citrus in the heart of eastern Sicily, between the Ionian Sea and the Iblei Mountains, preserving an authentic way of living the land for four generations.

p1.heading: FOUR GENERATIONS, ONE LAND
p1.body: Badiula is an organic farm located in Carlentini, in the province of Syracuse, extending over more than 120 hectares in the heart of eastern Sicily.

p2.heading: BETWEEN SEA AND LAND
p2.body: Between the breeze of the Ionian Sea and the fertility of volcanic soils, our groves find a perfect balance.
p2.body2: A unique microclimate that gives citrus fragrance, sweetness and character, in harmony with the natural cycles of the land.

p3.heading: SUPPLY & PROCESSING
p3.body: Every fruit is tracked on the blockchain to guarantee transparency and authenticity across the whole supply chain. Our processing centre is powered by a photovoltaic plant, for sustainable production from field to table.

productions.title: OUR PRODUCTIONS
productions.subtitle: Sicilian blood oranges IGP, blonde oranges, Femminello Siracusano lemons, bergamot and organic grapefruit: each variety follows its own harvest season to preserve freshness, aroma and organoleptic qualities.

luce.title: LUCE DI TERRA
luce.subtitle: The Badiula signature line dedicated to oil and the flavours of the land
luce.body: Luce di Terra gathers our artisanal transformations: citrus-infused oils, jams and preserves born from the fruits of our groves. Authentic flavours that hold the light of the Sicilian sun.

shop.title: Sicilian citrus straight from the grower
shop.subtitle: Fresh shipping across Italy, from our field to your table.

footer.quote: We don’t simply produce citrus, we cultivate a different way of living the land
